context: Tests whether the agent implements category-specific tiered commission rates correctly, excludes non-commissionable revenue from the commission base, runs fraud checks before attribution, sets the correct initial conversion status, and implements the right fraud signals with their assigned scores.

checklist.name: Per-line-item commission
checklist.description: Commission is calculated per line item (iterating over individual order items), not applied as a single rate to the entire order total

checklist.name: Subtotal-only commission base
checklist.description: Commission is calculated on subtotal/line item prices only — shipping and tax amounts are NOT included in the commission base

checklist.name: Default category rates
checklist.description: Default category rates are bronze: 8% (0.08), silver: 12% (0.12), gold: 15% (0.15) — or functionally equivalent values

checklist.name: Electronics category rates
checklist.description: Electronics category uses lower rates than default: bronze: 4% (0.04), silver: 6% (0.06), gold: 8% (0.08) — or functionally lower values

checklist.name: Digital category rates
checklist.description: Digital/software category uses higher rates than default: bronze: 20% (0.20), silver: 25% (0.25), gold: 30% (0.30) — or functionally higher values

checklist.name: Fraud check before attribution
checklist.description: isFraudulent() (or equivalent fraud check) is called BEFORE creating the conversion record, and normal attribution is skipped for fraudulent orders

checklist.name: Fraudulent conversion flagged
checklist.description: A fraudulent order creates a conversion record with status 'flagged' (not 'pending' or 'approved'), and triggers an alert to the fraud team

checklist.name: Initial status pending
checklist.description: Non-fraudulent conversions are recorded with status 'pending', not 'approved'

checklist.name: approvedAt null initially
checklist.description: New conversion records have approvedAt set to null

checklist.name: Self-referral signal
checklist.description: Fraud check includes self-referral detection by comparing the order customer's email to the affiliate's email; assigns score 100

checklist.name: IP velocity signal
checklist.description: Fraud check includes IP velocity: detects more than 5 orders from the same IP within 24 hours; assigns score 70

checklist.name: Fraud score threshold
checklist.description: Conversion is flagged as fraudulent when the total accumulated fraud score reaches or exceeds 100

checklist.name: Tier upgrade triggered
checklist.description: checkAndUpgradeTier (or equivalent) is called after recording each new conversion
